description: Quiz — asks 'what's six times four?' and validates the answer. '24' terminates silently; other input yields 'you lie!'.
expected_output: what's six times four? you lie!

2017-addison-bean.notes: Panics with `already borrowed: BorrowMutError` on the first FishDown tick — river.rs:237's move_salmon borrows the parent mutably while the tick recursion still holds it, so any multi-level tree crashes before producing output.

2018-martijn-arts.notes: No stdin support — input salmon are never created.

2023-james-thistlewood.notes: Reads input but produces no response.
